description: Every Discovery v2 endpoint plus offline search, multi-venue watchlists, residency dedup, and on-sale tracking no API call exposes.

env_var_specs.name: TICKETMASTER_API_KEY
env_var_specs.description: Ticketmaster Discovery API consumer key (32-char alphanumeric).

tools.name: attractions_find
tools.description: Find attractions (artists, sports, packages, plays and so on) and filter your search by name, and much more. Optional: sort (default: relevance,desc), classificationName, classificationId (plus 9 more). Returns array of Attraction.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sorting order of the search result. Allowable Values : 'name,asc', 'name,desc', 'relevance,asc', 'relevance,desc'

params.name: classificationName
params.description: Filter attractions by classification name: name of any segment, genre, sub-genre, type, sub-type

params.name: classificationId
params.description: Filter attractions by classification id: id of any segment, genre, sub-genre, type, sub-type

params.name: keyword
params.description: Keyword to search on

params.name: id
params.description: Filter entities by its id

params.name: source
params.description: Filter entities by its source name

params.name: includeTest
params.description: True if you want to have entities flag as test in the response.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number

params.name: size
params.description: Page size of the response

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: Yes if you want to display licensed content

params.name: includeSpellcheck
params.description: yes, to include spell check suggestions in the response.

tools.name: attractions_get
tools.description: Get details for a specific attraction using the unique identifier for the attraction. Required: id. Optional: locale (default: en), includeLicensedContent (default: no). Returns the Attraction.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the attraction

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: True if you want to display licensed content

tools.name: classifications_get
tools.description: Get details for a specific segment, genre, or sub-genre using its unique identifier. Required: id. Optional: locale (default: en), includeLicensedContent (default: no). Returns the Classification.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the segment, genre, or sub-genre

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: True if you want to display licensed content

tools.name: classifications_get-genre
tools.description: Get details for a specific genre using its unique identifier. Required: id. Optional: locale (default: en), includeLicensedContent (default: no). Returns the Genre.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the genre

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: True if you want to display licensed content

tools.name: classifications_get-segment
tools.description: Get details for a specific segment using its unique identifier. Required: id. Optional: locale (default: en), includeLicensedContent (default: no). Returns the Segment.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the segment

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: True if you want to display licensed content

tools.name: classifications_get-subgenre
tools.description: Get details for a specific sub-genre using its unique identifier. Required: id. Optional: locale (default: en), includeLicensedContent (default: no). Returns the Level.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the subgenre

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: True if you want to display licensed content

tools.name: classifications_list
tools.description: Find classifications and filter your search by name, and much more. Classifications help define the nature of attractions and events. Optional: sort (default: name,asc), keyword, id (plus 7 more). Returns array of Classification.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sorting order of the search result

params.name: keyword
params.description: Keyword to search on

params.name: id
params.description: Filter entities by its id

params.name: source
params.description: Filter entities by its source name

params.name: includeTest
params.description: True if you want to have entities flag as test in the response.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number

params.name: size
params.description: Page size of the response

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: Yes if you want to display licensed content

params.name: includeSpellcheck
params.description: yes, to include spell check suggestions in the response.

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Get details for a specific event using the unique identifier for the event. This includes the venue and location, the attraction(s), and the Ticketmaster Website URL for purchasing tickets for the event. Required: id. Optional: locale (default: en), includeLicensedContent (default: no). Returns the Event.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of the event

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: True if you want to display licensed content

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: Find events and filter your search by location, date, availability, and much more. Optional: sort (default: relevance,desc), startDateTime, endDateTime (plus 33 more). Returns array of Event.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sorting order of the search result. Allowable values : 'name,asc', 'name,desc', 'date,asc', 'date,desc', 'relevance,asc', 'relevance,desc', 'distance,asc', 'name,date,asc', 'name,date,desc', 'date,name,asc', 'date,name,desc','onsaleStartDate,asc', 'id,asc'

params.name: startDateTime
params.description: Filter events with a start date after this date

params.name: endDateTime
params.description: Filter events with a start date before this date

params.name: onsaleStartDateTime
params.description: Filter events with onsale start date after this date

params.name: onsaleOnStartDate
params.description: Filter events with onsale start date on this date

params.name: onsaleOnAfterStartDate
params.description: Filter events with onsale range within this date

params.name: onsaleEndDateTime
params.description: Filter events with onsale end date before this date

params.name: city
params.description: Filter events by city

params.name: countryCode
params.description: Filter events by country code

params.name: stateCode
params.description: Filter events by state code

params.name: postalCode
params.description: Filter events by postal code / zipcode

params.name: venueId
params.description: Filter events by venue id

params.name: attractionId
params.description: Filter events by attraction id

params.name: segmentId
params.description: Filter events by segment id

params.name: segmentName
params.description: Filter events by segment name

params.name: classificationName
params.description: Filter events by classification name: name of any segment, genre, sub-genre, type, sub-type

params.name: classificationId
params.description: Filter events by classification id: id of any segment, genre, sub-genre, type, sub-type

params.name: marketId
params.description: Filter events by market id

params.name: promoterId
params.description: Filter events by promoter id

params.name: dmaId
params.description: Filter events by dma id

params.name: includeTBA
params.description: True, to include events with date to be announce (TBA)

params.name: includeTBD
params.description: True, to include event with a date to be defined (TBD)

params.name: clientVisibility
params.description: Filter events by clientName

params.name: latlong
params.description: Filter events by latitude and longitude, this filter is deprecated and maybe removed in a...

params.name: radius
params.description: Radius of the area in which we want to search for events.

params.name: unit
params.description: Unit of the radius

params.name: geoPoint
params.description: filter events by geoHash

params.name: keyword
params.description: Keyword to search on

params.name: id
params.description: Filter entities by its id

params.name: source
params.description: Filter entities by its source name

params.name: includeTest
params.description: True if you want to have entities flag as test in the response.

params.name: page
params.description: Page number

params.name: size
params.description: Page size of the response

params.name: locale
params.description: The locale in ISO code format.

params.name: includeLicensedContent
params.description: Yes if you want to display licensed content

params.name: includeSpellcheck
params.description: yes, to include spell check suggestions in the response.
